name: com.unity.best-practices
description: Unity C# coding style guide, best practices and LLM instructions to boost your productivity.

samples.description: Observer pattern using GameEvent ScriptableObjects. Decouples senders from receivers without direct references.
ObjectPool<T> spawner with auto-release on disable using Unity 6 Awaitable.
Minimal UXML + USS + presenter wiring demonstrating the Model-View-Presenter pattern.
Enum-based state machine with IState interface and OnEnter/OnUpdate/OnExit lifecycle.
Singleton audio service wrapping ObjectPool<AudioSource> with AudioMixer group routing, music crossfading, and per-channel volume persistence via PlayerPrefs.
